DEFENDANTS CARLOS DIUGO CAVALCANTE, PRISCILA MOREIRA, AND ERICA MOREIRA ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAVEIRA, CRISTIANE MARTINS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOREIRA, PRISCILA MOREIRA, ERICA $1,430.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,505.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
